DESIGN_NOTE: DEMO2 DR_v2p2 Cu64-fix: removes the innermost Cu TES sample box, moves the nearest Cryoperm magnetic shield function/material into the former sample-box envelope, and adds a short Cu thermal finger through a bottom-center hole to the 50 mK/MXC plate.

COLD_PLATES.name: ColdPlate_MXC_50mK_Retained
COLD_PLATES.basis: Retained 50 mK/MXC detector mounting plate; TES/sample box/Nb/Cryoperm clearances are unchanged.

COLD_PLATES.name: ColdPlate_Still_0p7K_SDEnvelope
COLD_PLATES.basis: Still / ~0.7 K intercept plate enlarged for service clearance.

COLD_PLATES.name: ColdPlate_4K_SDEnvelope
COLD_PLATES.basis: 4 K condenser / pulse-tube intercept plate enlarged for DR service routing.

COLD_PLATES.name: ColdPlate_60K_SDEnvelope
COLD_PLATES.basis: 50/60 K radiation and pulse-tube first-stage plate; still inside unchanged CsI well.

SAMPLE_BOX.name: TES_SampleBox_Cryoperm
SAMPLE_BOX.basis: Cu64-fix sample box: Cryoperm material/function from the nearest magnetic-shield box, placed in the former TES_SampleBox_Cu envelope. Bottom has a center hole for a Cu thermal finger.

window.name: SampleBox_Al_Window
window.basis: Very thin Al foil placeholder; nominal only, open-aperture scan recommended.

OPEN_BOTTOM_CANS.name: Nb_SC_Detector_Can
OPEN_BOTTOM_CANS.basis: Open-bottom Nb superconducting can; top aperture is open in the nominal demo.

CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.name: Thermal_MXC_50mK_Al_Shield_Retained
CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.basis: Retained innermost MXC/50 mK detector radiation can; SD-scale DR flange is placed below this can, not through it.

CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.name: Thermal_Still_0p7K_Al_Shield_SDEnvelope
CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.basis: Still-stage radiation can; previous 1 K layer reinterpreted and enlarged.

CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.name: Thermal_4K_Al_Shield_SDEnvelope
CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.basis: 4 K radiation shield enlarged to carry condenser/line clearance.

CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.name: Thermal_60K_Al_Shield_SDEnvelope
CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.basis: 50/60 K shield in the unchanged-CsI compact envelope; radial gap to the vacuum jacket is only 1.5 mm, so this is a tight nominal and should be paired with an expanded-CsI systematic.

CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.name: Vacuum_Jacket_Al_SDEnvelope
CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.basis: Vacuum jacket enlarged but still kept inside the unchanged active CsI well.

STAGE_WINDOWS.name: Win_MXC_50mK_Al_Shield
STAGE_WINDOWS.basis: Thin Al thermal/optical blocking foil across the MXC can aperture.

STAGE_WINDOWS.name: Win_Still_0p7K_Al_Shield
STAGE_WINDOWS.basis: Thin Al thermal/optical blocking foil across the still-stage aperture.

STAGE_WINDOWS.name: Win_4K_Al_Shield_SDEnvelope
STAGE_WINDOWS.basis: Thin Al thermal/optical blocking foil across the 4 K aperture.

STAGE_WINDOWS.name: Win_60K_Al_Shield_SDEnvelope
STAGE_WINDOWS.basis: Thin Al thermal/optical blocking foil across the 60 K aperture.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: SQUID_Readout_Al_Box
PASSIVE_PROXIES.basis: Readout/support box proxy offset from aperture in the 4 K to 60 K radial gap. Review-fix: moved to the still--4 K radial gap to avoid the enlarged still shield.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Harness_Cu_Bundle_A
PASSIVE_PROXIES.basis: Cu harness/strap proxy. Review-fix: shifted upward so the lower end clears the enlarged MXC flange.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Harness_Cu_Bundle_B
PASSIVE_PROXIES.basis: Cu harness/strap proxy. Review-fix: shifted upward so the lower end clears the enlarged MXC flange.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Support_G10_Post_A
PASSIVE_PROXIES.basis: Low-Z support post in the 60 K shield to vacuum-jacket radial gap.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.basis: Low-Z support post in the 60 K shield to vacuum-jacket radial gap.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.basis: Low-Z support post in the 60 K shield to vacuum-jacket radial gap.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.basis: Low-Z support post in the 60 K shield to vacuum-jacket radial gap.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: ActiveShield_Al_Backplane_Liner
PASSIVE_PROXIES.basis: Thin Al support liner/readout backplane in the radial clearance outside the segmented CsI well.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: ActiveShield_Top_Al_Retainer

PASSIVE_PROXIES.basis: External active-shield readout/electronics box proxy outside the outer Al cover.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: ActiveShield_Readout_Box_YM
PASSIVE_PROXIES.basis: External active-shield readout/electronics box proxy outside the outer Al cover.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Shield_Feedthrough_Stainless_XP
PASSIVE_PROXIES.basis: Small stainless feedthrough/connector proxy outside the active-shield cover.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Shield_Feedthrough_Stainless_XM
PASSIVE_PROXIES.basis: Small stainless feedthrough/connector proxy outside the active-shield cover.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Vacuum_Jacket_Al_Reinforcement_SDEnvelope
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Reinforcement sleeve adjusted around the enlarged vacuum jacket.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Vacuum_Top_Flange_Al_SDEnvelope
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Top flange/collar mass below active-shield top; kept under r=10 cm.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Vacuum_Bottom_Flange_Al_SDEnvelope
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Bottom flange/collar mass above active-shield bottom; service-port systematic handled separately.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Passive_Cu_Inner_Liner_SDEnvelope
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Nearest passive liner remains Cu, not W, after shield enlargement.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Passive_W_Outer_Liner_SDEnvelope
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Outer high-Z side liner; still kept outside Cu and below active-shield inner radius.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Passive_Bottom_W_Shield_SDEnvelope
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Bottom W shield retained; no actual through-port cut in nominal, only port systematic note.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Passive_Top_W_Aperture_Annulus_SDEnvelope
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Top annular W aperture stop retained; Be/window radius still 1.898 cm.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_MXC_Flange_Cu_SDEnvelope
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: SD-class local MXC flange proxy (≈147 mm diameter) placed below the unchanged TES/sample-box region.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_MixingChamber_Cu
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Mixing chamber body below MXC flange; separated from Cryoperm and plate bottoms by explicit clearance.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_MXC_Sinter_HEX_AgProxy
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Porous sintered Ag / step HEX proxy near MXC; ring geometry avoids sample-box axis.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_Still_Pot_Cu
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Still pot below still plate; does not pierce the plate in v2.1.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_Continuous_HEX_CuNi_EQ
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Continuous CuNi heat-exchanger equivalent mass in the still-to-4K cavity.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_4K_Condenser_Cu
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: 4 K condenser/cold-finger mass below 4 K plate, with clearance.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_50K_CharcoalTrap_Proxy
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Internal charcoal/cryotrap effective mass near 50/60 K intercept; no plate overlap.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_CuNi_Capillary_MXC_to_Still
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Segmented CuNi inlet/return capillary; v2.1 avoids one long volume crossing plates.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_CuNi_Capillary_Still_to_4K
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Segmented CuNi capillary between still and 4 K cavities.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_CuNi_Capillary_4K_to_60K
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Segmented CuNi capillary between 4 K and 50/60 K regions; stopped below the 4 K shield bottom to avoid overlap.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_Precool_FlexLink_Cu_Still_to_4K
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Pre-cool/flex thermal link equivalent mass; not the ADR cyclic heat switch.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_MXC_to_Still_G10_Supports
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Sparse G10 stage supports, represented as annular equivalent mass.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_Still_to_4K_G10_Supports
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Sparse G10 stage supports between still and 4 K regions.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: DR_4K_to_60K_G10_Supports
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Sparse G10 stage supports between 4 K and 50/60 K regions.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Readout_NbTi_SS_Cable_Bundle_MXC_to_4K
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Heavier readout cable proxy than v1; avoids passing through the still plate as one long solid.

PASSIVE_PROXIES.name: Readout_NbTi_SS_Cable_Bundle_Still_to_MXC
PASSIVE_PROXIES.notes: Segmented readout/service bundle in MXC-to-still gap.

ACTIVE_SHIELD.name: CsI_Active_Shield
ACTIVE_SHIELD.basis: Nominal oxygen-free segmented CsI(Tl) active well from review.

OUTER_MECHANICAL_SHELL.name: Outer_Al_Mech_Shell
OUTER_MECHANICAL_SHELL.basis: Outer cover/support outside segmented CsI panels; not a pressure boundary.

WINDOWS.name: SampleBox_Al_Window
WINDOWS.basis: Retained thin Al top foil for the v2p2 Cryoperm sample-box aperture; not part of the removed Cu sample box mass.

WINDOWS.name: Win_Be_Cryostat
WINDOWS.basis: Current Be-window transport convention retained: r=1.898 cm, t=0.015 cm.

WINDOWS.name: Win_Vacuum_Al_Filter
WINDOWS.basis: Thin Al-equivalent vacuum/filter foil outside the Be window; conservative low-Z filter-stack proxy.

COLLIMATOR.name: W_Collimator_Aperture_Stop
COLLIMATOR.basis: Overlap-safe W annular aperture stop retained only as first passive entrance aperture proxy; not a Laue optic.

review_drivers: P1 passive detector-head mass closure with ADR mass proxies
60K/4K/1K/50mK Al thermal-window stack on open apertures
Cu/W passive shield outside the dewar; W kept away from TES; Sn reserved for systematic graded-Z variants
META.dr_policy: nominal is a compact local detector-head DR with internal-circulation/capillary proxies and an SD-class MXC-flange envelope; full commercial dry-DR use requires the remote envelope plus service-chimney systematic, not the nominal local mass only
META.shield_packaging_policy: active-shield packaging/readout entries are instantiated exactly once via PASSIVE_PROXIES; SHIELD_PACKAGING_* entries are non-instantiable views only
META.tes_sample_box_policy: TES stack, Cu sample box and sample-box Al window are intentionally unchanged.
v2p1_changes: removed ADR-only magnet/yoke/salt-pill/cyclic heat-switch and old thermal-bus proxies
enlarged local plates/shields to SD-class MXC flange scale without moving TES/sample box
deleted v1 dead-end still pump-line and used segmented capillary/internal-circulation proxies
removed duplicate instantiable MIDMASS/DR lists and converted SHIELD_PACKAGING to non-instantiable view lists
moved legacy SQUID/readout and harness boxes and added box-aware overlap checking
added stage-support and heavier readout/service cable proxies
added service-chimney, commercial PT, and Laue-optics systematic envelopes outside the nominal mass
downgraded single-layer Laue effective-area expectation and added diffuse-bulge rate sanity check
META.sample_box_policy: TES_SampleBox_Cu removed; TES_SampleBox_Cryoperm occupies the former sample-box envelope with bottom_hole=0.40 cm.

REMOTE_DR_ENVELOPE_SYSTEMATIC.notes: Optional Pb/rare-earth regenerator material proxy for commercial dry-DR systematic.

REMOTE_DR_ENVELOPE_SYSTEMATIC.notes: Optional 300 K top-plate/flange envelope for dry-DR systematic, not local nominal.

SERVICE_CHIMNEY_SYSTEMATIC.notes: Commercial dry-DR still-pumping/service chimney variant through the CsI/W bottom at off-axis radius; this is a streaming-path systematic, not part of the internal-circulation nominal.

SERVICE_CHIMNEY_SYSTEMATIC.notes: Local W baffle/sleeve around the bottom service chimney; included only in the commercial dry-DR service-port systematic.

REMOTE_LAUE_OPTICS_SYSTEMATIC.notes: Front-end Ge(111) crystal annulus envelope at 10 m; mass assumes full annulus area 73.9 cm^2 and 1 cm crystal-equivalent thickness.

REMOTE_LAUE_OPTICS_SYSTEMATIC.name: Laue_10m_OpticalBench_Frame_NotInNominal
REMOTE_LAUE_OPTICS_SYSTEMATIC.notes: Approximate 40 cm diameter lens frame / optical-bench mass systematic; truss/gondola still outside local nominal.

EXPANDED_CSI_WELL_SYSTEMATIC.name: Expanded_CsI_Well_RadialPlus2cm_NotInNominal
EXPANDED_CSI_WELL_SYSTEMATIC.notes: Non-nominal variant: expands the active well by 2 cm radius to recover MLI/packaging/service margin around an SD-envelope cryostat while keeping TES and sample box fixed.

tile_summary.layout_note: Broad-band 450--550 keV layout uses 4 radial rows. A credible 20 cm^2 @511 keV option requires 2--3 rows/layers centered near r_511, not just the broad-band single row.

effective_area_sanity.interpretation: Single-layer Ge(111) is better treated as 5--7 cm^2 at 511 keV. The 20 cm^2 value is a stretch goal requiring about three effective layers or a high-reflectivity bent-crystal implementation.

diffuse_science_sanity.science_recommendation: Use Laue focusing for point-like or compact 511-keV targets. Treat diffuse Galactic-bulge 511 keV as a non-focusing or wide-field spectrometer science case, not a 5-arcmin Laue-imaging case.

THERMAL_FINGER.name: SampleBox_Cu_ThermalFinger_50mK
THERMAL_FINGER.basis: Short Cu thermal finger through the new sample-box bottom hole; keeps a thermal path to the 50 mK/MXC plate while removing the large Cu box.
